channel.title: Wing Luke Museum
channel.description: Upcoming events for Wing Luke Museum

item.title: 2026 Annual Dinner & Auction
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Sheraton Grand Seattle: Grand Ballroom on Level 2, 1400 6th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98101

Wing Luke Museum brings you this year’s dinner and auction theme, “New Roots”, and returns to the Sheraton Grand Seattle.

Event details
